patient_data.chief_complaint: Sudden onset sharp chest pain and shortness of breath 5 days after knee replacement surgery
symptoms: Acute pleuritic chest pain — right-sided, worse with inspiration
Right calf swelling noted since yesterday
Mild anxiety and sense of impending doom
patient_data.history: Total knee replacement 5 days ago, on oral contraceptives, BMI 32, no prior VTE history

should_detect: Therapeutic anticoagulation — IV heparin drip (switch from prophylactic enoxaparin)
Right ventricular strain assessment (elevated troponin + BNP)
Consider thrombolysis if hemodynamically unstable (massive PE)
Lower extremity duplex ultrasound for concurrent DVT
Risk factors: post-op immobility + OCP + obesity
